---
title: Fun R Things
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: render-fun_R
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

items <- yaml::read_yaml("data/fun_r.yml")

for (row in items) {

  # Build links
  link_html <- ""

  if (!is.null(row$links)) {
    for (nm in names(row$links)) {
      url <- row$links[[nm]]

      icon <- switch(tolower(nm),
        "post" = "📝",
        "repo" = "💻",
        "demo" = "🚀",
        "slides" = "📑",
        "recording" = "🎥",
        "🔗"
      )

      link_html <- paste0(
        link_html,
        "<a class='link-btn' href='", url, "' target='_blank'>",
        icon, " ", toupper(nm),
        "</a> "
      )
    }
  }

  # Print FULL card as HTML
  cat(paste0(
    "<div class='card'>",
      "<div>",
        "<h3>", row$title, "</h3>",
        "<div class='meta'>", row$type, "</div>",
      "</div>",
      "<p>", row$description, "</p>",
      "<div class='links'>", link_html, "</div>",
    "</div>"
  ))
}

```
